scripts.test:privacy: bash -lc 'npm --prefix frontend run dev >/tmp/zcvios_test_server.log 2>&1 & SERVER_PID=$!; sleep 10; REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=http://localhost:3000 /root/.venv/bin/python -m pytest -q backend/tests/test_rpc_authenticated_flows.py -k "export or delete"; EXIT_CODE=$?; kill $SERVER_PID >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; exit $EXIT_CODE'
scripts.test: bash -lc 'npm --prefix frontend run dev >/tmp/zcvios_test_server.log 2>&1 & SERVER_PID=$!; sleep 10; REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=http://localhost:3000 /root/.venv/bin/python -m pytest -q backend/tests/test_rpc_auth_guards.py backend/tests/test_rpc_authenticated_flows.py backend/tests/test_strategy_trigger_scope.py; EXIT_CODE=$?; kill $SERVER_PID >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; exit $EXIT_CODE'
